text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back home from a trip out with
Silence Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh... Rain?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without so much as a warning, rain begins to
pour.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Aaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We dash inside the academy to escape the
sudden deluge.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It came out of nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
What should I do now? I was planning to go for a
run.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I could go back to my dorm, but it's so boring.
choice_data_list: Is there nothing you can do indoors?
Is there nothing you can do indoors?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Indoors... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I can't think of anything in particular. Do you
have any ideas?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Now that you mention it, we did get
a lot of homework today.
choice_data_list: You could focus on that today, then.
You could focus on that today, then.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I was so excited to run in the nice weather, I
wasn't paying much attention in class...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So... would you mind helping me out?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'm not very good at studying on my own...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I agree to lend Silence Suzuka a hand
with her studies.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ummm... Let me make sure I understand.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
To find the length, I have to apply this formula,
right?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Um... Now, let's see...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, maybe I'll have a bit of a mental reset after
this question—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...So it is.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. I think... I've solved it...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I think I can solve the rest of the
problems in the same way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But, um... Would you mind helping me with
another subject?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to finish everything today so that I can
make up for today's run tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
If you're here helping me, getting it all out of the
way should be a piece of cake.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Though I should warn you, there is a
lot left.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A lot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We manage to finish all of her homework, despite
it taking us until well past sundown.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Cooking?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I usually only make rice balls to eat while I run.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I can make anything more
complicated than that.
choice_data_list:
Balancing your diet is an important part of your
training!

Balancing your diet is an important part of your
training!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You're right... If it will help me run faster, I should
do it.
choice_data_list: Why don't you try making something new?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Gladly, if you would teach me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see. So running too much can cause anemia...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And that means I should ensure I'm consuming
lots of iron.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay. I'll go home and try it immediately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next morning...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I tried what you told me and found this recipe for
stir-fried liver and spinach. It was easy to make,
and it's full of iron.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You should have some. It's good for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I try out the food right away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Natural? You mean...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh! I-I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I should have seasoned it for you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
After a run, I tend to just focus on getting the
nutrition I need. I guess that mindset became the
norm for my cooking.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Y-you think so?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'll try making it again. I'll have Spe taste-test it
too.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So, I hope you'll agree to give it another try.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I have Silence Suzuka's stir-fried
liver and spinach for lunch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's turned out quite tasty this time. I can
definitely say she's made an improvement.
